I found your dentist appointment: "Dentist Appointment" on 2024-05-18 from 09:00 to 10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic (event id 5). Today's date is 2024-05-15, so the appointment is in 3 days.

How would you like to reschedule it? Please tell me one of the following:
- A new date and time in this exact format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (I will keep the same duration), or
- A new start and end time in that format, or
- Your availability/preferences (e.g., "next week mornings", "any day after May 20, afternoons", or specific days to avoid), and I can suggest open slots on your calendar.

Also tell me:
- Whether to keep the same location (Downtown Dental Clinic), and
- If I should notify anyone else about the change.

Once you tell me the new time or your preferences, I’ll reschedule it.
